title: lemyrea utilis
intro: Lemyrea utilis, also known as Lemyrea utilis, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lemyrea utilis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Lemyrea utilis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and in some cases, it is used as a topical application for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
